name: Admin Page
description: User management and app settings admin panel
details: Admin-only page with user management (list users, change roles) and key-value settings CRUD. Uses useUsers for listing, setRole for role changes, and useQuery/useMutations for a settings collection.
instructions: This layers an admin-only /admin panel on top of the /settings page that every scaffold already ships (that shared src/schemas/admin-schema.ts is why it reports "Exists (skipped)" here). Add a nav entry for /admin; keep /settings for per-user settings.
